Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA MCGREGOR Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award:
APPEAR: Doris Cheng, Esq. 981-7210 for pltf & moving party; Fletcher C. Alford, Esq. 986-5900 & Elisabeth A. Madden, Esq. 397-2800 for defts & opposing parties Kevin Stone, M.D. and The Stone Clinic.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD GRANTED). Prevailing party to prepare order per CRC 391; if any objections, deft may submit own order. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
